propositions: docs/api-stability.md hard-codes a 'currently X.Y.Z' package-version marker that duplicates pyproject.toml's version and has silently drifted.
The Event-schema row hard-codes a stale SCHEMA_VERSION literal (says 3 while the code is at 5), an instance of the same version-literal anti-pattern.
The stability policy should be stated version-agnostically, deferring the live version to the CHANGELOG and GitHub Releases like FastAPI/attrs.
tests/unit/test_version_sync.py exists solely to police the now-removed version marker and should be deleted along with it.
docs/releasing.md contains dangling references (git add of api-stability.md, test_version_sync mention) that must be removed while preserving the unrelated 1.0-declaration reference.
The same stale SCHEMA_VERSION literal in docs/event-schema.md was also de-literaled to remove all drift-prone version literals.
